title: Approve getMatches coverage + ADR-0003 (8 tests, no defects)
description: This run added src/features/grant-ingest/getMatches.test.ts (8 integration cases) pinning the matching-output assembly the dashboard consumes — the highest-blast-radius behavior in the app and previously untested. No source defect was found; the function behaves correctly, so this is pure regression coverage plus docs/adr/ADR-0003. Full suite green (19 files/202 tests), tsc clean. Decide whether to merge and whether to schedule the 2 remaining scoped tasks (4 pts: grants.gov network-fetch coverage + unifying close-date formatting between getMatches and deadline-radar).

title: Merge decision: APPROVE — getMatches/normalization changeset (0 defects, 202 green)
description: Code review returned APPROVE with notes. Source changes in grantsGov.ts (stableHash id fallback, toNum digit-guard) are correct hardening; getMatches.test.ts + grantsGov.test.ts add real regression coverage. Full suite 19 files/202 tests green, tsc clean, README verified accurate. One non-gating Low note: tests run against the real data/grants.db and DELETE FROM grants (pre-existing pattern) — recommend a hermetic test DB. Decide whether to merge and whether to schedule the follow-ups.

title: Security findings — 2 High / 1 Medium / 1 Low (Grant Writing Nonprofits, baseline scan)
description: Baseline security scan found 0 Critical, 2 High, 1 Medium, 1 Low. Review and accept/reject each finding for remediation tracking. H1 (live Gemini key on disk) and H2 (no auth + attachment IDOR) are the priorities; M1 is a transitive npm audit moderate; L1 is a latent-only DDL interpolation with hardcoded inputs.

title: Approve release v0.2.0 (MINOR — platform migration)
description: Finalized an unfinished release: bumped package.json 0.1.0→0.2.0 and created annotated tag v0.2.0 on commit 0c2f2a4. Bump type MINOR derived from the project's documented pre-1.0 convention (breaking platform changes → minor). Please confirm the version decision and whether to push the tag / commit the version bump.
